title: Valor Earned Not Stolen Act of 2025
short_title: Valor Earned Not Stolen Act of 2025
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
crs_summary: Valor Earned Not Stolen Act of 2025 This bill increases the maximum prison term—from one year to three years—for an individual who falsely claims to be the recipient of certain military awards (e.g., a Medal of Honor or Purple Heart) with the intent to obtain money, property, or other tangible benefit.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
